# Yohaku Companion v1.8.2

## Highlights

- Live Desk now publishes hosted application icons for applications that are not covered by Yohaku's built-in icon presets when Application Icon Hosting is enabled.

## Fixes and reliability

- Corrected media-session arbitration when browser playback takes over from a paused supported player, preventing stale player state from masking the active session.
- Kept application icon enrichment fail-safe: only public HTTPS URLs from the active hosting configuration are sent, and icon upload failures no longer suppress text Presence.

## Update notes

- Dynamic application icons require a valid Application Icon Hosting configuration, and the same public asset host must be allowed by Yohaku Core.
